query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalPolicies,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activePolicies,
  SUM(CAST(premium AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as totalPremium,
  SUM(CAST(calculatedCommission AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as totalCommission,
  SUM(CAST(targetPremium AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as totalTargetPremium
FROM inforcePolicies;

  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activePolicies,
  SUM(CAST(premium AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as totalPremium,
  SUM(CAST(calculatedCommission AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as totalCommission,
  SUM(CAST(targetPremium AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as totalTargetPremium
FROM inforcePolicies;
